<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]][[de:Wasser-Büffel]][[hak:Kui-chhiú]][[ja:癸丑]][[ko:계축]][[vi:Quý Sửu]][[za:Gveiqcouj]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]][[zh-yue:癸丑]][[zh:癸丑]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Ox|kanji=癸丑|romaji=mizunoto ushi|onyomi=kichū|p=guǐchǒu|w=kuei-ch'ou|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ ʈʂʰoʊ̯|y=gwai2 chau2|j=gwai2 chau2|ci=kʷɐi tsʰɐu̯|mc=kjwɨj tʂʰjuw|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ʈʂʰuʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Ox also known as  Kinoe-Ushi''' (癸丑, みずのとうし, きすいのうし, きちゅう) is one of the combinations in the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 50th combination in the cycle, following {{ill|Mizunoe-Ne|ja|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|壬子|1=Yang Water Rat|2=ja|3=壬子|4=zh|5=壬子|6=ko|7=임자|lt_ko=임자|8=fr|9=Rat de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Ratte|12=en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe-Ne|qq=}} and preceding {{ill|Kō-Inu|ja|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|甲寅|1=Yang Wood Tiger|2=ja|3=甲寅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kō-Inu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Tiger|qq=}}. According to {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (癸)|ja|癸|zh|癸|gan|癸|hak|Kui (thiên-kôn)|ja|Mizunoto|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|vi|Quý (Thiên can)|wuu|癸|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|Kúi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|癸|zh|癸|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Ox (zodiac)|en|Ox (zodiac)|WD=Q599644|lt=Ox (丑)|1=Ox (zodiac)}} represents Yin Earth, creating a {{ill|Conquest in Five Elements|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=relationship of conquest|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Conquest in Five Elements|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (Earth conquers Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Ox (癸丑)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-ushi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-ushi
***Onyomi 1: kichi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyechuk (계축)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu

<!--
==
* Yin Water Ox (癸丑) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐchǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 cau2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとうし (mizunoto-ushi)
***Onyomi: きかのうし (kika-no-ushi)
***Onyomi: きちゅう (kichū)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyechuk
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Sửu

-->
==Years of Yin Water Ox==
Gregorian calendar years that leave a remainder of 53 when divided by 60 correspond to years of Kinoe-Ushi.

{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Kinoe-Ushi'''
|-
! [[:en:1st Millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* {{ill|53|en|53|WD=Q4640335|lt=53|1=53}}
* {{ill|113|en|113|WD=Q416664|lt=113|1=113}}
* {{ill|173|en|173|WD=Q30344|lt=173|1=173}}
* {{ill|233|en|233|WD=Q31237|lt=233|1=233}}
* {{ill|293|en|293|WD=Q33318|lt=293|1=293}}
* {{ill|353|en|353|WD=Q32275|lt=353|1=353}}
* {{ill|413|en|413|WD=Q31510|lt=413|1=413}}
* {{ill|473|en|473|WD=Q31611|lt=473|1=473}}
* {{ill|533|en|533|WD=Q30482|lt=533|1=533}}
* {{ill|593|en|593|WD=Q33889|lt=593|1=593}}
* {{ill|653|en|653|WD=Q30094|lt=653|1=653}}
* {{ill|713|en|713|WD=Q23523|lt=713|1=713}}
* {{ill|773|en|773|WD=Q31131|lt=773|1=773}}
* {{ill|833|en|833|WD=Q30377|lt=833|1=833}}
* {{ill|893|en|893|WD=Q24762|lt=893|1=893}}
* {{ill|953|en|953|WD=Q23586|lt=953|1=953}}
|
* {{ill|1013|en|1013|WD=Q19241|lt=1013|1=1013}}
* {{ill|1073|en|1073|WD=Q19437|lt=1073|1=1073}}
* {{ill|1133|en|1133|WD=Q19586|lt=1133|1=1133}}
* {{ill|1193|en|1193|WD=Q19741|lt=1193|1=1193}}
* {{ill|1253|en|1253|WD=Q5498|lt=1253|1=1253}}
* {{ill|1313|en|1313|WD=Q5735|lt=1313|1=1313}}
* {{ill|1373|en|1373|WD=Q6261|lt=1373|1=1373}}
* {{ill|1433|en|1433|WD=Q6356|lt=1433|1=1433}}
* {{ill|1493|en|1493|WD=Q6687|lt=1493|1=1493}}
* {{ill|1553|en|1553|WD=Q6568|lt=1553|1=1553}}
* {{ill|1613|en|1613|WD=Q6776|lt=1613|1=1613}}
* {{ill|1673|en|1673|WD=Q7617|lt=1673|1=1673}}
* {{ill|1733|en|1733|WD=Q6972|lt=1733|1=1733}}
* {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793|1=1793}}
* {{ill|1853|en|1853|WD=Q7666|lt=1853|1=1853}}
* {{ill|1913|en|1913|WD=Q2080|lt=1913|1=1913}}
* {{ill|1973|en|1973|WD=Q2477|lt=1973|1=1973}}
|
* {{ill|2033|en|2033|WD=Q12786|lt=2033|1=2033}}
* {{ill|2093|en|2093|WD=Q972053|lt=2093|1=2093}}
* [[:en:2153|2153]]
* {{ill|2213|en|2213|WD=Q47413739|lt=2213|1=2213}}
* [[:en:2273|2273]]
* [[:en:2333|2333]]
* [[:en:2393|2393]]
* [[:en:2453|2453]]
* [[2513]]
* [[2573]]
* [[:en:2633|2633]]
* [[2693]]
* [[2753]]
* [[2813]]
* [[2873]]
* [[:en:2933|2933]]
* [[:en:2993|2993]]
|}

==Months of Yin Water Ox==
The twelfth month (December) of Gregorian calendar years ending in 2 or 7 (Heavenly Stems 壬 or 丁) corresponds to Kinoe-Ushi months. However, this applies to the {{ill|Lunar calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar terms|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Shōkan|1=Xiaohan}} to the day before {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|WD=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}}) in traditional contexts.

==Days of Yin Water Ox==
=== Auspicious Dates ===
Days of Kinoe-Ushi are noted as intercalary days during the {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} period.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Teng-chháu]]
[[zh-yue:丁巳]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Water Ox|qq=ja|癸丑|version=84123844|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Dĭng-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Metall-Schlangeni]]
[[de:Yin Water Ox]]

[[en:Water Ox]]
[[ja:癸丑]]
[[zh:癸丑]]
[[ko:계축]]
[[fr:Buffle de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Büffel]]

[[af:Metaalslang (astrologie)]]
[[de:Metall-Schlangeni]]
[[en:Metal Snake]]
[[fr:Serpent de métalboishak]]
[[it:Ding-chṳ́id]]

[[ko:정사 (간지)]]
[[vi:Đinh Tỵ]]
[[za:Dingceij]]
[[zh:丁巳]]
[[ar:Yin Water Ox]]

<!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--><!--Water Ox--><!--Water Ox--><!--Water Ox--><!--Water Ox-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]]
[[hak:Kui-chhiú]]
[[vi:Quý Sửu]]
[[za:Gveiqcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:癸丑]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[af:Wateros (astrologie)]]
[[cdo:Gŭi-tiū]]
[[hak:Kui-chhiú]]
[[vi:Quý Sửu]]
[[za:Gveiqcouj]]
[[zh-min-nan:Kùi-thiú]]
[[zh-yue:癸丑]]
{{wikidata link|Q267521}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
